parameters.query:
SELECT id, protagonist_name, known_for, primary_hook, domain_category, source_notes
FROM humanos_stories
WHERE editorial_status = 'researching'
ORDER BY updated_at ASC
LIMIT 1;

parameter.name: query
parameter.value: ={{$json.protagonist_name}} early life childhood poverty family background origin

parameter.name: query
parameter.value: ={{$json.protagonist_name}} key decision risk turning point bet everything

parameter.name: query
parameter.value: ={{$json.protagonist_name}} legacy impact why important today history

message.content:
Eres Borges, el Cazador de Protagonistas del proyecto HUMANOS. Tu tarea es generar la Ficha Narrativa del personaje en formato JSON estricto. El JSON debe contener exactamente estos campos:
{
  "one_line_story": "string (1 frase)",
  "human_before_success": "string (origen/infancia)",
  "central_conflict": "string (el gran conflicto)",
  "key_decision": "string (la decision crucial)",
  "main_risk": "string (que arriesgo)",
  "transformation": "string (resultado y cambio)",
  "legacy_today": "string (por que importa hoy)",
  "hook_family": "string (una de: sabias_que, lo_que_nadie_sabe, antes_de, contradiccion, humano_detras, todo_comenzo, a_punto_de)",
  "primary_hook": "string (el hook principal)",
  "alternative_hooks": ["string1", "string2", "string3", "string4"],
  "closing_angle": "string",
  "story_level": "string (microstory, extended_story, miniseries, premium_season)",
  "publish_timing": "string (publish_now, soon, hold_for_series, premium_reserve)",
  "series_potential": true/false,
  "estimated_episode_count": integer,
  "suggested_episode_titles": ["ep1", "ep2"],
  "narrative_score": integer(1-10),
  "familiarity_score": integer(1-10),
  "surprise_score": integer(1-10),
  "emotional_score": integer(1-10),
  "research_confidence": integer(1-10),
  "production_difficulty": integer(1-10),
  "strategic_value": integer(1-10),
  "priority_score": integer(1-10),
  "series_score": integer(1-10),
  "fact_check_status": "string (pending, verified, partial, failed)",
  "fact_check_notes": "string",
  "source_notes": "string"
}
No incluyas explicaciones ni bloques de codigo markdown, solo el objeto JSON.

parameters.query:
=UPDATE humanos_stories
SET
  editorial_status = 'researched',
  one_line_story = '{{$json.one_line_story.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  human_before_success = '{{$json.human_before_success.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  central_conflict = '{{$json.central_conflict.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  key_decision = '{{$json.key_decision.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  main_risk = '{{$json.main_risk.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  transformation = '{{$json.transformation.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  legacy_today = '{{$json.legacy_today.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  hook_family = '{{$json.hook_family}}',
  primary_hook = '{{$json.primary_hook.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  alternative_hooks = '{{JSON.stringify($json.alternative_hooks)}}'::jsonb,
  closing_angle = '{{$json.closing_angle.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  story_level = '{{$json.story_level}}',
  publish_timing = '{{$json.publish_timing}}',
  series_potential = {{$json.series_potential}},
  estimated_episode_count = {{$json.estimated_episode_count || 'null'}},
  suggested_episode_titles = '{{JSON.stringify($json.suggested_episode_titles)}}'::jsonb,
  narrative_score = {{$json.narrative_score || 'null'}},
  familiarity_score = {{$json.familiarity_score || 'null'}},
  surprise_score = {{$json.surprise_score || 'null'}},
  emotional_score = {{$json.emotional_score || 'null'}},
  research_confidence = {{$json.research_confidence || 'null'}},
  production_difficulty = {{$json.production_difficulty || 'null'}},
  strategic_value = {{$json.strategic_value || 'null'}},
  priority_score = {{$json.priority_score || 'null'}},
  series_score = {{$json.series_score || 'null'}},
  fact_check_status = '{{$json.fact_check_status || "pending"}}',
  fact_check_notes = '{{$json.fact_check_notes.replace(/'/g, "''")}}',
  source_notes = '{{$json.source_notes.replace(/'/g, "''")}}'
WHERE id = '{{$json.id}}';

parameter.name: message
